name: send_message
description: Send a message via Telegram, WhatsApp, Signal or SMS. ALWAYS call this directly when the user says 'send/schick' + a messaging provider — do not ask for confirmation, do not first check the provider list. Recipient values: 'mir' / 'me' / 'myself' (sends to the Klacks owner via Settings -> Adresse Sekretariat — works without any further info), or a phone number / Telegram chat ID / contact name. Provider parameter: 'telegram' / 'whatsapp' / 'signal' / 'sms'.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: The messaging provider name (e.g., telegram, whatsapp)

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Recipient identifier. Use 'mir' / 'me' / 'myself' to send to the Klacks owner (looks up Settings -> Adresse Sekretariat). Otherwise: phone number (e.g. '+41791234567'), Telegram chat ID (numeric, e.g. '8559310736'), or contact name (e.g. 'Max Muster') which is then resolved against Klacks contacts.

name: read_messages
description: Read recent messages from messaging providers. Shows incoming and outgoing messages with sender, content, and timestamp.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Filter by provider name (e.g., telegram, whatsapp)

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: Filter by sender phone number or ID

name: list_messaging_providers
description: List all configured messaging providers with their name, type, and enabled status.
